infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: MapSale can use location to find items near you.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: MapSale can use location to find items near you.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: MapSale uses your camera to take photos of items you want to list for swapping or selling, and to scan QR codes for quick item lookup.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: MapSale needs photo library access to select images.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: MapSale needs to save photos to your library.
